problem id: 8a45a3d4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  11111111 -> 11111111
  00100011 -> 11011101
  11000011 -> 01100001
  10001111 -> 01010111
  10111000 -> 11011100
  10101111 -> 01010111
  10001110 -> 01110111
  00110001 -> 10111011

query: 01000100
predicted answer: 11111111
